creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
WITH_BDB_VER=..., since r365599, gets prioritized over USE_BDB, where it used to be ignored when it was in conflict with USE_BDB.

Relevant list posts:

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2014-August/094916.html

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2014-August/094941.html
